sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n43901" key="eu)hkh/s2" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐηκής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἄκος</etym>) <sense id="n43901.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">healing</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">βάξις</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1342.tlg001:112:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Emp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">112.11</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
